---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}

# Let's Connect

I welcome conversations about bioinformatics, computational biology, scientific data visualization, and collaborative research projects.

[Email Me](mailto:mrice183@gmail.com){.btn .btn-primary}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/marina-rice-3071a1a9){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
[GitHub](https://github.com/riceroni18){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

:::

## Current Interests

- Computational Biology
- Bioinformatics
- Scientific Data Visualization
- Genomics
- Genome Annotation
- Spatial Biology
- Reproducible Research

I welcome conversations about research collaborations, internships, hackathons, graduate opportunities, and computational biology projects.
